zh.lifeSummary: 當William Fairfax Knt.於1498年出生在英國越可爾沃爾頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt.28歲，母親Anne Gascoigne18歲。他於1541年10月26日與Ann Baker在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1588年在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲享年90歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可沃爾辛厄姆 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Fairfax Knt.于1498年出生在英国越可爾沃爾頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt.28岁，母亲Anne Gascoigne18岁。他于1541年10月26日与Ann Baker在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1588年在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲享年90岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可沃爾辛厄姆 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Fairfax
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for someone with beautiful long hair, from Middle English fair fax ‘beautiful tresses’. This was a common descriptive phrase in Middle English: the alliterative poem Sir Gawain and the Green Knight refers to ‘fair fanning fax’ encircling the shoulders of the doughty warrior.
History: Thomas Fairfax (1693–1781), an army officer from Leeds Castle, Kent, England, first came to VA in 1735 and settled on maternal estates there as a proprietor in 1747.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When William Fairfax Knt. was born in 1498, in Walton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt., was 28 and his mother, Anne Gascoigne, was 18. He married Ann Baker on 26 October 1541, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1588, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, at the age of 90, and was buried in Walsingham Abbey, Norfolk, England.

fr.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, Unite: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Fairfax Knt. est né en 1498, à Walton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt., avait 28 ans et sa mère, Anne Gascoigne, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Ann Baker le 26 octobre 1541, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1588, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à Walsingham Abbey, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Fairfax Knt. 1498 in Walton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt. 28 und seine Mutter Anne Gascoigne 18. Er hat am 26. Oktober 1541 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Ann Baker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1588 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England und wurde in Walsingham Abbey, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Fairfax Knt. è nato il nel 1498 nel Walton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt., aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Anne Gascoigne, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Ann Baker il 26 ottobre 1541, nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1588, nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolto a Walsingham Abbey, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Fairfax Knt.が1498年にイギリスヨークシュアイアワルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt.は28歳，母Anne Gascoigneは18歳であった。1541年10月26日にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズでAnn Bakerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1588年にイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズで90歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクワルシンガム アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, Unite: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: William Fairfax Knt.(이)가 1498년 영국 요르크실르 월턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt.(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Gascoigne(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1541년 10월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 Ann Baker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1588년 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 월징함 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Fairfax Knt. nasceu em 1498, em Walton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt., tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Anne Gascoigne, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Baker em 26 de outubro de 1541, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1588, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Walsingham Abbey, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, Unite: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Fairfax Knt. родился в 1498 г. в местности валтон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt. было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Gascoigne, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Baker 26 октября 1541 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1588 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности валсингхам эбби, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Fairfax Knt. nació en 1498, en Walton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt., tenía 28 años y su mamá, Anne Gascoigne, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Ann Baker el 26 de octubre de 1541, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1588, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en Walsingham Abbey, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
